laws.title: Sale of Immovable Property
laws.meaning: Sale is a transfer of ownership in exchange for a price paid or promised. A sale of immovable property of value Rs. 100 or more can only be made by a registered instrument.

laws.title: Recovery of Specific Immovable Property
laws.meaning: A person dispossessed of immovable property without consent may recover it by suit within 6 months from date of dispossession.

laws.title: Criminal Trespass
laws.meaning: Whoever enters or remains in property in possession of another with intent to commit offence, or to intimidate, insult or annoy.
laws.punishment: Up to 3 months imprisonment or fine up to Rs. 500 or both

laws.title: Documents of which Registration is Compulsory
laws.meaning: Instruments relating to immovable property worth Rs. 100 and above must be compulsorily registered.
laws.punishment: Unregistered document cannot be admitted in evidence

laws.title: Temporary Injunction
laws.meaning: Courts may grant temporary injunctions to restrain a party from doing acts that would cause irreparable injury to property.

laws.title: General Rules of Succession for Males
laws.meaning: Sets out the order of inheritance for property of a Hindu male dying intestate.

laws.title: Preliminary Survey and Publication of Notice
laws.meaning: Government must publish notice before acquiring land and pay fair compensation to land owners.

questions.text: What type of property dispute is this?
What type of property is involved?
Do you have registered title/sale deed in your name?
How long have you been in possession of the property?
Who is the other party in the dispute?
Is the property currently physically accessible to you?
Has any court case been filed earlier related to this property?

recommended_actions: Obtain certified copy of all title documents from Sub-Registrar office
Apply for updated survey sketch from Revenue / Survey Department
File complaint with Revenue Divisional Officer for encroachment
Approach civil court for Permanent Injunction or Declaration of Title
Apply for Temporary Injunction to prevent further encroachment
Issue legal notice to encroaching party demanding vacation
If tenant dispute: serve eviction notice under applicable Rent Control Act
